title: Deploy a Next.js App to Kubernetes
description: End-to-end route from containerizing your app to running it on a Kubernetes cluster with TLS, health checks, and rolling-update CI/CD.

steps.description: Containerize the app with a multi-stage Dockerfile and .dockerignore
Set up CI to build and push the Docker image on every main-branch push
Create k8s manifests (Deployment, Service, Ingress) and apply to cluster
Add error monitoring so you know when pods crash in production
